title: Agent runners variants manifest
description: Machine-readable list of install overlays under variants/. The portal provisioner threads the chosen variant id into the cloud-init line as AGENT_RUNNER, which install.sh / base/run.sh resolve to a variants/<name>/ directory.

version.description: Manifest format version. Bump when the shape of an entry changes in a non-additive way.

default.description: Variant name install.sh / base/run.sh fall through to when AGENT_RUNNER is unset. MUST match one of variants[].name.

name.description: Slug matching the variants/<name>/ directory. Threaded into cloud-init as AGENT_RUNNER.

title.description: Short human label for the wizard dropdown / portal display.

description.description: One-paragraph explanation of what the overlay adds, drops, and which scenario it targets.

hooks.description: Names of hook scripts the variant ships (e.g. 'early-setup', 'pre-services', 'post-services'). The corresponding file must exist at variants/<name>/<hook>.sh. Omit a hook by leaving it out of the array (base/run.sh skips missing hooks silently).

default.description: Convenience marker mirroring the top-level `default` field. Only one variant should set this to true.
